commitFor(address,bytes32).details: Mirrors commitVote but allows any caller (relayer EOA) to submit.      The relayer pays gas; the commitment is stored under the voter address.

commitFor(address,bytes32).notice: Relayer-submitted commit on behalf of a whitelisted voter.
